name: get_hospital_id_by_name
description: Get hospitalId given a hospital name. Use this when you need to resolve a hospital name to its ID for JSON responses. Supports partial name matching (case-insensitive). Returns hospitalId and hospitalName for matching hospitals (max 5 results). Essential for getting the exact hospitalId needed for final JSON output to the user.

hospital_name.description: Hospital name or partial name to search for. Case-insensitive partial matching supported. Examples: 'Apollo', 'Yashoda', 'Continental', 'KIMS', 'Sunshine', 'Care', 'Rainbow'
